mcp_tools.name: mcp_calendar.get_availability
mcp_tools.description: Get available advisor slots for a specific date
mcp_tools.returns: List of available slots with id, datetime, duration

mcp_tools.name: mcp_calendar.create_hold
mcp_tools.description: Create a tentative hold on a slot

parameters.slot_id: ID of the slot to hold

mcp_tools.name: mcp_calendar.reschedule_hold
mcp_tools.description: Reschedule a hold to a new slot

parameters.new_slot_id: New slot ID to move to

mcp_tools.returns: Success status and new hold details

mcp_tools.name: mcp_notes.append_pre_booking_note
mcp_tools.description: Append a note to the advisor pre-bookings log
